name: kartana
flavor_texts: This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself.
One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade.
This Ultra Beast’s body, which is as thin as paper, is like a sharpened sword.
Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.
text: Kartana is the Drawn Sword Pokémon. It is a grass and steel-type Pokémon. Abilities: beast-boost. Base stats — HP: 59, Attack: 181, Defense: 131, Sp. Atk: 59, Sp. Def: 31, Speed: 109. Evolution line: kartana. Lore: This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself. One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade. This Ultra Beast’s body, which is as thin as paper, is like a sharpened sword. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.
